title: Buff Steamed Mo:Mo

ingredients.title: Buff Filling
items: Buff mince (water buffalo) — 500 g, finely ground
Tomato — ½ small, grated or finely minced

instruction.title: Dough
steps: Add water slowly and knead into a smooth, tight dough.
Resting helps gluten form and makes wrappers stretch without tearing.

instruction.title: Filling
steps: Combine minced buff with all filling ingredients.
Mix well by hand to activate proteins.
Cold filling prevents fat from melting early and keeps momos juicy.

instruction.title: Shaping
steps: Divide dough into small balls (approx. 10–12 g each).
Roll into thin edges with slightly thicker center wrappers.
Fold into pleat style (round or half-moon).
Thin edges give elegant restaurant-style finish.

instruction.title: Steaming
steps: Grease steamer tray or line with cabbage leaves.
Arrange momos leaving space between each.
Steam on high heat for 10–12 minutes (do not oversteam).

chefTips: Keep dough stiff and roll wrappers fresh for best texture.
Add a little water or stock in filling for juiciness.
Use Timur for authentic Nepali flavor.
Never over-steam — momos should be glossy, not wrinkled.
